utterances.speaker: Dr. Baldhara
utterances.text: Well , it is technically not a zoo per se , it is more of an interactive wildlife experience .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Baldhara
utterances.text: Let me ask you some questions about , is it , uh , Marcel ?

utterances.speaker: Dr. Baldhara
utterances.text: Does he , uh , fight with other animals ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No ... no , he is , he is very docile .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well I , I do not know . Why ?

utterances.speaker: Dr. Baldhara
utterances.text: Uh , how is he at handling small objects ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: He can hold a banana , if that is whatcha mean ...

utterances.speaker: Dr. Baldhara
utterances.text: How about a hammer , or a small blade ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: He ... he ... he got in , he ... he got in to San Diego .

emotion_cause.span: 13_He ... he ... he got in , he ... he got in to San Diego .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: We , we come back from our walk and the ... the phone was ringing ...

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: He is in ! Oh , did you hear that , Marcel ? San Diego . San Diego !

utterances.speaker: Dr. Baldhara
utterances.text: You are making a big mistake here . I mean , San Diego all well and good , but if you give him to me , I will start him off against a blind rabbit and give you twenty percent of the gains .
